method: Misses inferred from hand-applying L1 rules; missing trigger signals identified where 'INVISIBLE would have caught this if scanner/DECIDER had X signal' but spec did not name X.

misses.tuning_proposal: Add 'BackgroundTasks' to async-ops-net signal list with weight 2.0 (specific framework anti-pattern). Add scanner rule: `BackgroundTasks.add_task(fn, ...)` where fn touches an integration → P1.
Add `schedule` (lib name), `schedule.every(`, `schedule.run_pending(` to async-ops-net libs. Scanner rule: schedule usage with no distributed-lock co-occurrence → P1.
Add scanner rule under auth-net: Rails cookie hash literal missing `secure:` or `same_site:` → P1. Add `permanent` cookie → P1 (effectively infinite session).
Add `lemon-squeezy`, `paddle`, `polar` to payment-net libs trigger list. Audit other modern MoR/payment vendors not in current list.

misses.evidence: F-MAYBE-3, F-INBOX-1; pattern repeated across 3 webhook receivers in 2 repos
misses.missing_signal: Webhook handler body has signature verify but no event_id dedup table insert / unique-constraint check
misses.tuning_proposal: Add scanner heuristic: a function file matching webhook-receiver shape (sig verify present) that does NOT include a dedup lookup pattern (insert into events table / `WHERE event_id =`) → P1.
Add `app/api/**/webhook/`, `app/api/**/callback/` to integration-net paths trigger. Boost score to ensure receiver discipline rules fire.

misses.missing_signal: Anthropic / OpenAI SDK calls without `cacheControl` / cache_control / `prompt-cache` / equivalent
misses.tuning_proposal: Add scanner pattern: LLM call (Anthropic SDK / OpenAI SDK / AI SDK helpers) with no cache-control hint on stable system-prompt segment → cost-advisor P1 (when project spend ≥ threshold) or P2.

misses.missing_signal: Absence of rate-limiter decorator on auth routes
misses.tuning_proposal: Scanner rule under auth-net rule 9: auth route (login/signup/reset/verify) without rate-limit decorator visible → P1. Stack adapters per framework: Rails `Rack::Attack`, FastAPI `slowapi @limiter.limit`, Next.js Upstash Ratelimit, Django ratelimit.

top_proposals_deduped_ranked.title: Webhook-event-dedup scanner pattern
top_proposals_deduped_ranked.estimated_impact: would have caught 3 silent-killer findings across 2 repos (F-MAYBE-3, F-INBOX-1; plus generalizes to Stripe webhook gap class)
top_proposals_deduped_ranked.implementation_cost: moderate — needs heuristic on file shape, not just keyword

top_proposals_deduped_ranked.estimated_impact: would have caught F-DISPATCH-2 + generalizes across FastAPI projects

top_proposals_deduped_ranked.estimated_impact: would have caught F-DISPATCH-3; high false-positive risk needs careful tuning

top_proposals_deduped_ranked.estimated_impact: ensures payment-net fires on LS/Paddle/Polar projects

top_proposals_deduped_ranked.title: Next.js webhook path trigger
top_proposals_deduped_ranked.estimated_impact: ensures receiver-discipline rules fire on App Router pattern

next_round_plan: Apply top 4 proposals (rank 1-4). Re-scan same 3 repos. Expect: M1/M3/M5/M8 cleared. Estimate aggregate misses drop to ~2/repo. If achieved, stop tuning + ship. If not, proposal ranks 5-8 next.
